mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, merchant_id, menu_item_id, quantity, unit_price_cents FROM cart_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_items (user_id, merchant_id, menu_item_id, quantity, unit_price_cents, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{menuItemId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPriceCents}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = quantity + VALUES(quantity), unit_price_cents = VALUES(unit_price_cents), merchant_id = VALUES(merchant_id), updated_at = NOW()
